'''''Widowmaker''''' was a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]], captained by [[Arien Yage]]. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenants]] [[Stalgis]] and [[Tarl (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Tarl]] were members of its [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] contingent.

[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] stayed aboard within a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]] when he commanded the [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]]. ''Widowmaker'' targeted the building that [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] was to infiltrate on her mission to [[Onadax]]. It later participated in the [[Battle of Zonama Sekot (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Zonama Sekot]], and was abandoned as the planet once more vanished into hyperspace after encountering the ''[[Red Qurang]]''. It remained lost in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], and following the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] tasked [[Tahiri Veila]] (who was traveling on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]) with locating the ship.
